table.noDataDescription: Add a new job to get started.
table.noDataMassiveDescription: Add jobs manually or upload an Excel file

delete.title: Confirm deletion
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this job?

createSuccess.title: Job created successfully
createSuccess.description: The job has been created correctly

updateSuccess.title: Job updated successfully
updateSuccess.description: The job has been updated correctly

deleteSuccess.title: Job deleted successfully
deleteSuccess.description: The job has been deleted correctly

processCompletedSuccess.title: Process completed successfully
processCompletedSuccess.description: The bulk upload process has completed successfully

processCompletedWithErrors.title: Process completed with errors
processCompletedWithErrors.description: Review the table for more details

validation.companiesRequired: Please select at least one company

excel.title: Instructions:
excel.step1: Download the Excel template to see the required format
excel.step2: Fill in the job information in the template
excel.step4: Verify the information and press Process

manual.title: Instructions for manual entry:
manual.step1: Click Add Row to add a new job
manual.step2: Fill in the required fields in each row
manual.step3: You can add as many rows as needed
manual.step4: Verify the information and press Process

validation.companiesRequired: Please select at least one company

welcome.title: Welcome to the Jobs module
welcome.description: In this module you can manage jobs and positions. This guide will show the main features.

toolbar.title: Main actions
toolbar.description: Here you can search by code or name, add jobs individually, perform bulk upload from Excel, or download the list.

table.title: Jobs table
table.description: List of jobs with code, name, description, assigned companies and creation date. Use edit or delete buttons to manage each job.

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.description: Navigate between pages and adjust the number of records displayed.
